role_summary: Monitors system health, CPU/RAM usage, and the operational status of all registered child agents by asynchronously pinging their health endpoints, providing a comprehensive system status.
primary_capabilities: Read and parse the agent registry for active child agents.
Asynchronously ping health endpoints of registered child agents.
Aggregate and report a comprehensive system status.
Expose a dedicated health check endpoint for external monitoring.

api_endpoints.summary: Provides a comprehensive system health report including CPU, RAM, and child agent statuses.
Initiates continuous monitoring of system and child agent health, optionally sending reports to a specified destination.
